info.title: Twitter API
info.description: Twitter data API, providing endpoints for user and tweet information.

name.description: The user's display name shown on the profile.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user's account was created.

isBlueVerified.description: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.

protected.description: Whether the account is protected, meaning its tweets are visible only to approved followers.

url.description: Web link to the badge image.

badge.description: The badge image of the affiliation.

description.description: Text describing the affiliation, such as the parent organization's name.

url.description: Destination address of the affiliation link.

urlType.description:
Category of the affiliation link, indicating how it should be handled.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明 urlType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。]

url.description: Link the affiliation badge points to.

userLabelDisplayType.description:
How the affiliation label is rendered on the profile.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明 userLabelDisplayType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。]

userLabelType.description:
The kind of user label this badge represents.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明 userLabelType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。]

affiliates_highlighted_label.description: The highlighted affiliation badge that marks the user as belonging to a parent organization.

account_based_in.description: Country or region X reports the account is based in.

location_accurate.description: Whether the reported account location is considered accurate.

learn_more_url.description: Link to X's help page explaining the About-account information.

affiliate_username.description: Screen name of the organization this account is affiliated with.

source.description:
Where the About-account information was sourced from.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明 source 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。]

count.description: Number of times the account has changed its username.

username_changes.description: Summary of how often the account has changed its username.

about_profile.description: Contents of the 'About this account' panel, such as where the account is based and how that location was determined.

url.description: Web link to the badge image.

badge.description: The badge image of the identity label.

url.description: Destination address of the identity-label link.

urlType.description:
Category of the identity-label link, indicating how it should be handled.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明 urlType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。]

url.description: Link the identity label points to.

userLabelDisplayType.description:
How the identity label is rendered on the profile.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明 userLabelDisplayType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。]

userLabelType.description:
The kind of user label this identity badge represents.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明 userLabelType 的可取值及各自含义，待研发确认。]

identity_profile_labels_highlighted_labe.description: Highlighted identity label, such as a government or official-account marker.

data.description: The user's profile and About-panel details.

status.description: Outcome marker of the request: success when the profile was returned, error otherwise.

msg.description: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.

type.description: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.

userName.description: The follower's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.

url.description: Web link to the follower's profile page.

name.description: The follower's display name shown on the profile.

isBlueVerified.description: Whether the follower holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.

verifiedType.description: The follower's verification category, such as a business or government account.

profilePicture.description: Web link to the follower's avatar image.

coverPicture.description: Web link to the follower's profile banner image.

location.description: Free-text location the follower lists on their profile.

followers.description: Number of accounts following the follower.

following.description: Number of accounts the follower follows.

canDm.description: Whether the follower currently accepts direct messages from the requester.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the follower's account was created.

favouritesCount.description: Number of tweets the follower has liked.

hasCustomTimelines.description: Whether the follower has created custom timelines.

isTranslator.description: Whether the follower participates in the Twitter translation program.

mediaCount.description: Number of media items the follower has posted.

statusesCount.description: Total number of tweets the follower has posted.

withheldInCountries.description: Country codes where the follower's account is withheld for legal reasons.

possiblySensitive.description: Whether the follower's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.

pinnedTweetIds.description: Identifiers of tweets the follower has pinned to the top of their profile.

isAutomated.description: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.

automatedBy.description: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.

unavailable.description: Whether the follower's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.

message.description: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.

unavailableReason.description: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.

users.description: Followers of the user, returned for this page.

status.description: Outcome marker of the request: success when followers were returned, error otherwise.

msg.description: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.

type.description: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.

url.description: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.

text.description: Full text content of the tweet.

source.description: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.

retweetCount.description: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

replyCount.description: Number of replies to the tweet.

likeCount.description: Number of likes on the tweet.

quoteCount.description: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.

viewCount.description: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

lang.description: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.

bookmarkCount.description: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

isReply.description: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.

inReplyToId.description: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.

conversationId.description: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.

displayTextRange.description: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.

inReplyToUserId.description: Identifier of the user being replied to.

inReplyToUsername.description: Username of the user being replied to.

tweets.description: The user's most recent tweets returned for this page.

has_next_page.description: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.

status.description: Outcome marker of the request: success when tweets were returned, error otherwise.

message.description: Human-readable message; carries the error detail when status is error.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: Screen name (@handle, without the @) of the user whose About profile you want.

get.description: Fetch the public profile and the 'About this account' panel for a single user identified by screen name, including account origin, identity labels, and affiliate badges.

get.summary: Batch Get User Info By UserIds

parameters.name: userIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of numeric user IDs to look up in this batch.

get.description: Look up the profiles of multiple users in one call by passing their numeric user IDs, avoiding one request per user.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: Screen name (@handle, without the @) of the user whose profile you want.

get.description: Fetch the profile of a single user identified by screen name.
Retrieve a user's own tweets in reverse-chronological order, matching the ordering shown on their profile. Optionally include replies and the parent tweets they reply to; paginate with the cursor.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user whose timeline to retrieve.

parameters.name: includeReplies
parameters.description: Whether replies posted by the user are included alongside their original tweets.

parameters.name: includeParentTweet
parameters.description: When a returned tweet is a reply, whether to also include the tweet it replies to.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Identifier of the user whose recent tweets to retrieve; provide this or userName.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: Screen name of the user whose recent tweets to retrieve; provide this or userId.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.

parameters.name: includeReplies
parameters.description: Whether replies posted by the user are included alongside their original tweets.

get.description: Retrieve a user's most recent tweets, identified by either user ID or screen name, with optional replies and cursor pagination.

parameters.name: userName
parameters.description: Screen name (@handle, without the @) of the user whose followers you want.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: How many followers to return per page.

get.description: List the accounts that follow a given user, identified by screen name, with cursor pagination and a configurable page size.
